case_title: KYMBERLEY THOMAS VS. G. JAMES AVERY,II,M.D. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-07-2006 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-26-2006 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: FLOYD L. BUTLER, CSR#2518 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518 (212)
